description_long: This ottoman features a plush, square cushion upholstered in rich, dark brown faux leather with a subtle pebbled texture. The cushion is adorned with deep button tufting, creating a quilted effect and adding visual interest to the surface. The base is a solid, matte black rectangular block that provides sturdy support and contrasts with the soft upper section. Four short, round metallic legs elevate the ottoman slightly off the ground, giving it a modern and stable appearance. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor patios. The ottoman's proportions suggest it is comfortable for sitting or resting feet, while its materials are chosen for durability and easy maintenance.
description: A modern, square ottoman with a tufted dark brown faux leather cushion, matte black base, and four round metallic legs. The design is plush, sturdy, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the deep button tufting and rounded cushion edges, with two metallic legs visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical tufting pattern and the full width of the cushion, with both front legs visible.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the cushion's texture and tufting, with the right-side metallic legs in view.
description_view_3: Right-side view emphasizing the cushion's depth and the clean lines of the base, with the rightmost legs most prominent.
